I don't know this city. Can you tell me where it is located?
response: Atlanta is a major city in the southeastern United States, specifically located in the state of Georgia. It is situated in the foothills of the Appalachian Mountains at an average elevation of around 1,000 feet (300 meters) above sea level. The Chattahoochee River flows through the northwestern part of the metro area. Atlanta serves as a major transportation hub and economic center for the region. Istanbul is located in northwestern Turkey, straddling both Europe and Asia across the Bosphorus Strait. This unique positioning makes it one of the few transcontinental cities in the world. On the European side, it lies within the Marmara Region, bordered by the Black Sea to the northeast and the Sea of Marmara to the south. The Asian part is located on the Anatolian peninsula.
